title: Uniblock Transaction
description: Schema representing a blockchain transaction with detailed execution information as returned by the Uniblock Unified API.

transactionHash.description: The unique hash identifier of the transaction.

value.description: The value transferred in the native token's smallest unit.

blockNumber.description: The block number containing the transaction.

blockTimestamp.description: The timestamp of the block containing the transaction.

status.description: The execution status of the transaction.

gasUsed.description: The amount of gas consumed by the transaction.

gasPrice.description: The gas price at which the transaction was executed.

input.description: The input data of the transaction in hexadecimal format.

logs.description: Event logs emitted during the transaction execution.

TransactionLog.description: An event log emitted by a smart contract during transaction execution.

logIndex.description: The position of the log entry in the block.

address.description: The smart contract address that emitted the event.

topics.description: Indexed event topics used for filtering and identification.

data.description: Non-indexed event data in hexadecimal format.
